member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.ItemIdRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9a-fA-F]{32}$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.SafeIdentifierRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,128}$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [-.0-:A-Z_a-z] atomically at least 1 and at most 128 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.UserViewsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/Users/[0-9a-fA-F]{32}/Views$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "/Users/".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match the string "/Views".
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.UserItemsRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/Users/[0-9a-fA-F]{32}/Items(?:/[0-9a-fA-F]{32})?(?:/Resume)?$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "/Users/".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match the string "/Items".
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "/Resume".
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.ShowRouteRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/Shows/[0-9a-fA-F]{32}/(Seasons|Episodes)$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "/Shows/".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match '/'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "Seasons".
○ Match the string "Episodes".
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoCloudConnectorService.SafeErrorRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9]{2,80}$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z].
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Za-z] atomically at least 2 and at most 80 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoPlaybackSecurity.ItemIdRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[0-9a-f]{32}$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoPlaybackSecurity.StaticRouteRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/Videos/([0-9a-fA-F]{32})/(stream|master\\.m3u8|main\\.m3u8)$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "/Videos/".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match '/'.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "stream".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match the string "ma".
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ster.m3u8".
○ Match the string "in.m3u8".
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoPlaybackSecurity.SegmentRouteRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/Videos/([0-9a-fA-F]{32})/hls1/main/(\\d+)\\.(ts|mp4|m4s)$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "/Videos/".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] exactly 32 times.
○ Match the string "/hls1/main/".
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ 3rd capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ts".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'm'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "p4".
○ Match the string "4s".
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Kaevo.Plugin.KaevoForJellyfin.Services.KaevoPlaybackSecurity.RangeRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^bytes=\\d*-\\d*$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "bytes=".
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically any number of times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiHexDigits
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFabcdef".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiHexDigitsLower
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789abcdef".
